data.name: Dr. Jane Muthoni
data.message: I am a researcher at JKUAT interested in the Smart Mushroom pilot project. I would like to know more about the IoT sensors being used and how we can collaborate on the data collection and analysis. I have been following the BRIDGE-AI project and I'm particularly interested in the GenAI predictive analytics component. Could we schedule a meeting to discuss potential synergies with our ongoing research on mushroom cultivation? I look forward to hearing from you.

data.name: Grace Akinyi
data.message: I am a journalist with the Daily Nation. I am writing a feature article on how AI and IoT technologies are transforming agriculture in Kenya. I would like to request an interview with the BRIDGE-AI project team and a visit to the JKUAT Smart Farm Zone to see the Smart Mushroom pilot in action. I am available next week. Please let me know if you can accommodate this request.

data.name: James Omondi
data.message: We are producing a documentary on agritech innovations in Kenya and would like to feature the Smart Mushroom project. We would like to do a site visit and film the demonstration farm operations. We can bring our own production team and equipment. Please let us know when would be a good time for us to come and what permissions are required.
